 # NovaMind Strategy Memory
 
-## Current State (Week 1 / Day 7)
-- Cash: $816,591
-- Subscribers: 0 (94 leads lost)
-- T1 research in progress (completes ~day 12, +0.04 quality boost)
-- Model tiers: all Tier 1 (0.6 mult, cheapest)
-- Prices: A=$15, B=$45, C=$99
-- Dev spend: $1,500/day, Ops: $500/day, Capacity: T0 ($85/day)
+## Current State (Week 2 / Day 14)
+- Cash: $794,284
+- Subscribers: 6 (all S1 on Plan B at $19)
+- T1 research in progress (started day 0, expected day 30, ~16 days remaining)
+- Model tiers: A=1, B=2, C=2
+- Prices: A=$5, B=$15, C=$39
+- Dev spend: $2,000/day, Ops: $500/day, Capacity: T0 ($85/day)
+- Ad spend: $400/day focused on S1 (search_ads=$200, social_media=$150, content=$50)
 - No active enterprise leads
+- Open issues: 1
 
 ## Key Learnings
-- All 94 leads lost because delivered quality (0.127) is too low for current prices
-- S1 has q_min=0.081, WTP=$26 - most price-sensitive
-- S3 has q_min=0.145, WTP=$193 - higher quality expectations
-- E2 has q_min=1.094 - extremely high quality bar, not reachable soon
-- T1 research gives quality jumps that dev spending alone cannot match
+- All 6 subscribers are S1 on Plan B - this is the only segment we can convert at current quality
+- S1 q_min=0.081, WTP=$25.87 - most price-sensitive but reachable
+- S2 q_min=0.37, S3 q_min=0.145 - will be reachable after T1 research (+0.04 quality)
+- E1 WTP=19.62 but q_min=0.736 - wants quality but cheap (hard to serve)
+- E2 q_min=1.094 - extremely high quality bar, not reachable soon
+- Conversion rate to S1 at Plan B $19 was ~19% (6 of 32 leads)
+- Daily net burn ~$3,100 without ads, plus $400 in targeted ads = ~$3,500/day
+- ~35 weeks runway at current burn if no new subscribers
 
 ## Strategy
-1. **Immediate**: Lower prices dramatically to get first conversions from S1
-2. **Medium-term**: Increase model tiers and dev spending for quality
-3. **Long-term**: As quality improves, raise prices; discover/expand to new segments
-4. **R&D**: T1 in progress, will unlock ability to do higher tiers
+1. **Immediate**: Lowered Plan B to $15 to increase S1 conversion rate; maintain ad spend on S1
+2. **Wait for T1**: When T1 completes (~day 30), quality boost will open S2/S3 segments
+3. **Medium-term**: After quality boost, raise prices and expand to S2/S3
+4. **Long-term**: Discover new segments via market research; enterprise sales
 
-## Unexplored Areas
-- 20 undiscovered market segments (potential high-value groups)
-- Enterprise sales (0 threads so far)
-- Ad channel effectiveness per group
-- Promotions targeting
+## Week 3 Plan
+- Keep low prices to maximize S1 conversion funnel
+- $400/day ad spend targeting S1 specifically
+- Reduce dev from $2,500 to $2,000 to conserve cash (still positive quality growth)
+- Monitor subscriber growth; if conversion rate improves with lower prices, consider even more ad spend
+- Once T1 completes, reassess pricing and ad targeting
+
+## Cash Trajectory
+- Current burn: ~$3,500/day = ~$24,500/week
+- Revenue: ~$3.80/day (6 subs * $19 / 30)
+- Net: -$3,460/day
+- If we grow to 20 subs: revenue ~$10/day, still burning $3,490/day
+- If we grow to 100 subs at Plan B $15: revenue ~$50/day
+- Critical: we need quality boost to serve higher-WTP segments profitably
